notes: Confirmed that CanvasSize is not exposed as a public property on SKCanvasView or SKGLView in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor. The private field 'canvasSize' exists in both components but has no public accessor, while all other platform views (WPF, WinForms, WinUI, iOS, macOS, Android, MAUI) expose 'public SKSize CanvasSize'. The Dpi property was already exposed on these Blazor components via PR #1832, establishing the precedent. PR #1912 attempted to add this but was closed without merge. Feature gap confirmed on 3.119.0-preview.1.2, 3.119.2, and current main branch source.

reproductionSteps.description: Create Blazor WASM project and add SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.0-preview.1.2
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new blazorwasm -o . && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor --version 3.119.0-preview.1.2

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect SKCanvasView.razor.cs source: private 'SKSize canvasSize' field at line 25 with no public property, while Dpi is publicly exposed as 'public double Dpi => dpi' at line 65
reproductionSteps.output:
25: private SKSize canvasSize;
65: public double Dpi => dpi;

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect SKGLView.razor.cs source: private 'SKSize canvasSize' field at line 33 with no public CanvasSize property
Verify WPF SKElement.cs exposes public CanvasSize property — confirms other platform views have this feature
reproductionSteps.output: 30: public SKSize CanvasSize { get; private set; }

reproductionSteps.description: Verify workaround compiles: accessing canvas size from OnPaintSurface event args (e.Info.Width/Height) works

filesCreated.description: Blazor page using workaround to get canvas size from event args instead of CanvasSize property

versionResults.notes: Feature does not exist — private canvasSize field has no public accessor. Workaround via event args compiles.
Feature still does not exist on latest stable — same missing property.
Source code inspection confirms canvasSize field is still private with no public accessor on main branch.

actionability.reason: Valid feature request — CanvasSize is exposed on every other platform view but missing from Blazor components. The property exists as a private field, so the fix is trivial (one-line property per component). PR #1912 was closed without merge but the gap remains.

actions.description: Apply feature-request and Blazor views labels

workarounds: Access canvas size from SKPaintSurfaceEventArgs.Info inside OnPaintSurface callback: new SKSize(e.Info.Width, e.Info.Height)
